iran_nuke.notes: Day 14 — NUCLEAR TRACK ESCALATING. Bulletin of Atomic Scientists reports Trump admin renewed emphasis on nuclear weapons option for Iran (OPLAN 8010-12). Israel struck 200+ targets in western/central Iran in 24h including ballistic missile launchers and air defense. Large explosions heard across Tehran. Katz: operation 'will continue without any time limit.' 90+ Iranian vessels damaged/destroyed. Trump says US will hit Iran 'very hard' next week. French soldier killed — first Western military casualty. Guardian: Trump publicly contemplating ending increasingly costly war. Israeli security sources: no realistic regime change plan existed. No nuclear test or enrichment escalation. Nuclear rhetoric signal remains highest concern.

iran_conventional.notes: Day 14 — MASSIVE ESCALATION. Israel struck 200+ targets in western/central Iran in 24h (ballistic missile launchers, air defense, weapons production). Large explosions across Tehran. IDF says 'extensive wave' of strikes on Iranian capital. 90+ Iranian vessels including 30+ mine-laying ships damaged/destroyed. Trump says US will hit Iran 'very hard' next week. French soldier killed in conflict — first Western military casualty. Guardian: Trump contemplating ending increasingly costly war. Israeli security sources: regime change plan was 'wishful thinking' with no hard intelligence. War approaching 2-week mark, 2000+ killed regionally. Katz: 'operation without time limit.' NEW: Trump war-weariness emerging as possible de-escalation vector.

israel_lebanon.notes: Day 14 — ESCALATING. Israel struck center of Beirut, most powerful bombardment of southern suburbs in this round. Israel preparing to expand operations in Lebanon. 680+ killed, 800,000+ displaced. Katz says operation has 'no time limit.' Two IDF soldiers killed, 14 wounded in south Lebanon. IDF chief: war 'will not be short.' Hezbollah continues missile strikes. NEW: Trump contemplating ending war could affect Lebanon front.

turkey.notes: Iranian missiles intercepted over Turkish airspace (2 incidents). NATO Article 4 discussions. Erdogan warns Iran but insists Turkey is 'on side of peace.' NATO forces building up off Cyprus. Iranian drone hit UK base in Cyprus. No direct Turkish involvement. Stable.

india.notes: No India-Pakistan border buildup. Pakistan deployed army to Gilgit-Skardu to suppress pro-Iran protests. Shiite demonstrators attacked UN observer offices in Azad Kashmir. No bilateral escalation. Stable.

russia.notes: Russia calls on US/Israel to stop attacks and negotiate. Russia continues arms supply to Iran. No direct ME military involvement. Trump's Russia sanctions removal for oil supply shows pragmatic engagement. Putin strengthening internet censorship. Russia exploiting US ME distraction on Ukraine front. NEW: Trump war-weariness may open door for Russia diplomatic leverage.

china.notes: Chinese flights around Taiwan resumed March 13 after ~2-week pause. Trump delaying Taiwan arms sale for Trump-Xi summit (Mar 31-Apr 2). De-escalatory posture. DPRK condemns US ME attacks — China notably silent. No new escalation signals.

north_korea.notes: DPRK Foreign Ministry condemned US-Israel attacks on Iran. Kim inspected weapons factory. No missile or nuclear tests. DPRK aligning rhetoric with China/Russia anti-US position but no military action. Stable.

russia_ukraine.notes: Occupies ~20% Ukraine. 128 combat clashes on March 11. Russia launched 103 airstrikes, 322 guided aerial bombs, 9,216 kamikaze drones in 24h. Scorched-earth attacks on energy infrastructure. Russia exploiting US distraction. Coalition of 34 countries now providing all military support to Ukraine. NEW: Trump's war-weariness on Iran may extend to Ukraine deal pressure. US weapons diverted to ME alarming European allies.

changed_signals.de_escalation_watch: Trump war-weariness signal emerging. Guardian reports Trump 'publicly contemplating ending increasingly costly war.' Israeli security sources admit regime change plan was 'wishful thinking.' This is the first significant de-escalation signal from the US/Israel side. Monitor for ceasefire proposals or diplomatic openings.

latest_news.headline: Israel strikes 200+ targets in western/central Iran in 24 hours
latest_news.text: Israeli military announced strikes on ballistic missile launchers, air defense systems, and weapons production sites across western and central Iran. Most intensive single-day strike campaign since war began Feb 28.

latest_news.headline: Large explosions heard across Tehran as Israel launches 'extensive wave' of strikes
latest_news.text: Large explosions heard across Iranian capital. Israeli military announced start of new 'extensive wave' of strikes on Tehran. Forced evacuation orders issued.

latest_news.headline: Trump says US plans to hit Iran 'very hard' over next week
latest_news.text: President Trump publicly stated the US plans to intensify strikes on Iran significantly over the coming week as war approaches two-week mark.

latest_news.headline: 90+ Iranian vessels including 30+ mine-laying ships damaged or destroyed
latest_news.text: US-led coalition has damaged or destroyed over 90 Iranian naval vessels including more than 30 mine-laying ships as part of Hormuz mine clearance operations.

latest_news.headline: French soldier killed — first Western military casualty in conflict
latest_news.text: French President Macron announced one French soldier killed in the Iran conflict — first military casualty from a non-US/non-Israel Western nation.

latest_news.headline: Trump publicly contemplating ending increasingly costly war
latest_news.text: Multiple reports suggest Trump is weighing whether to end the Iran war, which has killed 2000+ people and disrupted global energy supplies. Israeli security sources admit no realistic regime change plan existed.

latest_news.headline: Israel prepares to expand operations in Lebanon
latest_news.text: Israel preparing to expand military activity in Lebanon. IDF struck center of Beirut — most powerful bombardment of southern suburbs in current round. 680+ killed, 800,000+ displaced.

latest_news.headline: War approaching two-week mark — 2000+ killed, global energy crisis deepens
latest_news.text: The US-Israel war on Iran approaches its 14th day. Over 2000 people killed regionally. Strait of Hormuz near-total shutdown continues. Oil at ~$100/barrel. IEA recommends massive strategic reserve releases.

outlook: CRITICAL and ESCALATING with DE-ESCALATION WATCH: Day 14 — Israel launched its most intensive strike campaign yet: 200+ targets in western/central Iran, large explosions across Tehran. 90+ Iranian vessels destroyed. Trump vows to hit Iran 'very hard' next week. French soldier killed — conflict now has Western military casualties beyond US/Israel. HOWEVER: First significant de-escalation signal — Guardian reports Trump 'publicly contemplating ending increasingly costly war.' Israeli security sources admit regime change plan was 'wishful thinking.' This is a potential inflection point. Katz insists operation has 'no time limit.' Watch for: Trump war-weariness vs hawks pushing escalation, Iran nuclear rhetoric response to massive Tehran strikes, Lebanon ground expansion, whether Hormuz mine clearance succeeds, Iran retaliation against ALL Gulf energy infrastructure, and whether formal ceasefire/diplomatic track emerges.
